overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a historical action game (Assassin's Creed Unity), showing a character in 18th-century attire walking through a sunlit stone alley in a European city, entering a building, and traversing a dimly lit wooden storage corridor toward a bright exit. The clip transitions from outdoor historic stone architecture to narrow indoor wooden interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone alley between historic buildings

events.description: character turns right toward the building entrance on the right side
approaching and entering the doorway from outdoor alley to indoor space

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow stone alley and approaching a doorway on the right side of the path

notable_agents.action: civilian in brown coat standing near wooden post, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: weathered gray stone wall with rough texture and wooden door frame
thick vertical wooden beam supporting the structure
stone steps leading upward between the buildings
stone archway opening to distant buildings and sky
dark rectangular doorway entrance in the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow sunlit stone alley between historic buildings, passing a civilian standing near a wooden post. The stone steps lead upward toward a dark doorway entrance, which the character approaches and enters, transitioning from the bright exterior to the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow wooden storage corridor inside historic building

events.description: dramatic shift from bright natural sunlight to dim interior lighting
approaching bright exterior light visible through the exit doorway at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit wooden corridor filled with storage barrels and debris, heading toward the bright exit

entered.detail: rough aged wooden plank walls with visible grain and nails
rough aged wooden plank walls with hanging ropes and tools
large cylindrical wooden storage barrel with metal bands
coiled rope hanging on the right wall
small metal lantern mounted on the left wall
bright doorway at the far end of the corridor leading outside

segments.scene_description: Inside the building, the character traverses a narrow wooden storage corridor with rough plank walls, passing barrels and coiled ropes. The space is dimly lit with light filtering from the far exit. As the character progresses, the bright exit doorway grows larger, silhouetting the character against the exterior light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, historic city alley into the dim, enclosed interior of a wooden storage building. It begins with the character walking through a narrow sunlit stone passage between old buildings, passing a civilian by a wooden post. As the character ascends stone steps, the camera follows them through a dark doorway, shifting the environment from the open exterior to a confined indoor space. The scene then moves through a narrow corridor of rough wooden planks, passing barrels and coiled ropes in the dim light. Finally, the camera progresses toward a bright exit doorway that grows larger, silhouetting the character against the returning exterior light.
